meta.title: The Workshop
meta.description: Customer → Project → Asset. Every build we've shipped, drillable.
meta.note: No PII. Public company names + asset inventory only; contacts/financials omitted.

customers.name: Ametek
customers.blurb: AI-powered Copilot Studio agent for AMETEK Sensors & Fluid Management Systems engineers and proposal managers. Addresses all 7 steps of the RFP & Proposal workflow for non-ITAR aerospace OEM RFPs.

workspaces.name: Hkp Rma
workspaces.blurb: Six small RAPP agents that together automate AMETEK HKP's RMA (Return Material Authorization) intake and triage, sitting on top of the existing WarrantyandClaimOperations v1.0.0.14 Dataverse solution in Mfg Gold Template.

workspaces.name: Hkp Rma Accelerator
workspaces.blurb: 1. Read INSTALL.md — covers prerequisites, the 4-step install sequence, smoke test, and connection-reference overrides. 2. workspaces.name: Sfdc Meeting Capture
workspaces.blurb: Customer: Carrier Corporation Use case: Auto-create Teams meetings from a Salesforce Service Cloud Case, link them back to the case, and capture the recording, transcript, summary, and action items as a Case activity when the meeting ends. Platform: Salesforce Service Cloud · Microsoft Graph (Teams) · Power Automate ·

customers.name: Ascend
customers.blurb: Customer engagement for Ascend — Phase 6 Upstream Procurement Agent suite. Conversational Purchase Requisition (PR) agent deployed on Copilot Studio with SAP ECC 6.0 integration.

workspaces.name: Flows
workspaces.blurb: All 7 Copilot Studio topics call a single Power Automate flow per operation. Each flow reads the ERP_SYSTEM environment variable and routes internally to the correct backend. Copilot Studio topics never change — only the env var needs updating to switch ERP systems.

The portal is the digital backbone for their distributor-contractor ecosystem — handling deal registration, rebate claims, Pro Partner enrollment, Step-Up programs, and co-op fund management across 6 user groups.
